theme_and_archetype.rationale: Balances the deep violet branding (#7C3AED) and requested rounded-xl/Sora styling (soft/friendly) with the high density and structural clarity needed for an enterprise CRM dashboard (Swiss).

hierarchy.label: text-[11px] sm:text-xs font-semibold tracking-wider uppercase text-slate-500
hierarchy.stat_number: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-bold font-mono tracking-tighter text-slate-900

grids_and_layouts.dashboard_container: max-w-[1440px] mx-auto p-4 sm:p-6 lg:p-8 space-y-6
grids_and_layouts.card: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 p-5

sections.header: col-span-12 flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between items-start sm:items-center gap-4 mb-2
sections.top_stats: col-span-12 grid grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-5 gap-4

header.title: Page Title + Date string (e.g., Today, 24 Oct)
header.actions: Date Range Filter (Shadcn Select) + Primary Button (+ New Lead) in Violet

topbar.structure: Org switcher dropdown (left), Search (center/optional), Notification Bell with Red Dot & Dropdown + User Avatar (right)

sidebar.style: bg-slate-900 border-r border-slate-800 text-slate-400. Active states text-white bg-slate-800 rounded-lg. Logo in violet gradient.

stat_cards.structure: Label (text-xs uppercase), Number (JetBrains Mono text-3xl), Trend Arrow + Percentage (text-sm green/red), Inline Sparkline at the bottom (Recharts TinyLineChart). Height is fully utilized.

funnel_chart.structure: Horizontal stacked bar chart. Labels: New, Contacted, Interested, Admission. Use Recharts BarChart with layout='vertical' or custom HTML div segments for conversion visualization.

activity_feed.structure: Right rail vertical timeline. Custom relative positioned dots with left border. Actor + Verb + Timestamp.

today_followups.structure: Compact list. Name, time, status. Quick actions on hover: WhatsApp icon button (green), Call icon button (violet).

empty_state.structure: Centered flex container. Custom 3D illustration, title 'No data yet', subtitle 'Start adding leads to see your dashboard come alive', CTA Button 'Add your first lead'.

motion_and_interactions.numbers: Use framer-motion to animate number count-up on initial load for the stat cards.
motion_and_interactions.cards: Subtle hover lift `-translate-y-0.5` and `shadow-md` for interactive widgets/rows.
motion_and_interactions.buttons: Active state scaling `active:scale-95`, hover background transitions.
motion_and_interactions.dropdowns: Shadcn defaults with standard enter/exit opacity and scale animations.

accessibility.testing_attributes: All buttons, links, dropdowns, form inputs, and key numeric outputs MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g. `data-testid='new-lead-button'`).
accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text on violet background passes APCA guidelines. Ensure slate-500 labels on white background are legible.
accessibility.screen_readers: Add `aria-hidden='true'` to decorative icons. Ensure Sparklines have an `aria-label` describing the trend.

empty_state.description: Friendly, minimalist 3D illustration for dashboard empty states
empty_state.usage: Use in widgets when there is no data to show, or as the main page empty state.

leaderboard_icon.usage: Use as a header icon or decorative element in the Counselor Leaderboard widget.

avatars.usage: Female avatar for leaderboard or topbar user profile

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Update /app/frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.jsx (or similar entry file) to implement the 'control_room_grid' (12-column grid) defined in grids_and_layouts.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Retain the existing deep violet brand (#7C3AED) but apply it purposefully for primary CTAs, active states, and charts. Maintain the dark sidebar.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Use Shadcn components for Select (date filter), DropdownMenu (notifications/org switcher), and Buttons. Heavily customize their styling to match the rounded-xl aesthetic and minimal 1px slate-200 border look.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Integrate Recharts. Add TinyLineChart for stat card sparklines, BarChart for the Lead Funnel, PieChart for Source distribution, and LineChart for the main monthly trends block.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image services. Use the exact Unsplash avatar URLs for the Leaderboard and Activity Feed, and the generated 3D illustrations for the empty state.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Add `data-testid` to EVERY interactive element (buttons, filters, tabs) and key data points (stat numbers) to support robust automated E2E tests.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Integrate framer-motion for micro-interactions: animate number count-ups in the stat cards and use a subtle stagger-children animation on the initial dashboard render.
